description_long: This is a compact, futuristic airplane with a predominantly red and gray color scheme, accented by blue highlights on the cockpit and engine areas. The fuselage is angular and streamlined, with a sharply pointed nose and a canopy-style cockpit situated near the front. The wings are integrated into the body and feature a low-wing configuration with a slight forward sweep, while the rear houses two prominent cylindrical jet engines with visible exhausts. The tail section is minimal, with twin vertical stabilizers mounted on either side of the engines. The surface appears metallic and slightly weathered, with geometric markings and insignias adding to its high-tech appearance.
description: A compact, angular red and gray airplane with blue cockpit accents, twin rear jet engines, and integrated low-swept wings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, blue cockpit canopy, and the angular, wide-set wings with visible forward-facing weaponry.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, low-swept wing, and the cylindrical jet engine with visible exhaust at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin jet engine exhausts, dual vertical stabilizers, and the symmetrical layout of the tail section.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the fuselage, wing, and engine details, with geometric markings and weaponry visible.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with slight forward sweep and integrated wing roots; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted jet engines, cylindrical nacelles integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers mounted on either side of the rear fuselage, forming a dual-fin tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with visible main gear under the wings and a nose gear under the cockpit.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy integrated into the fuselage nose.
